home.title: Dalyan Turkey | Ancient Kaunos, Iztuzu Beach & Caretta Caretta
home.description: Discover Dalyan, Turkey — explore ancient Kaunos ruins, pristine Iztuzu Beach, Caretta Caretta turtles, thermal springs & river boat tours in this Mediterranean gem.

tarih.title: Ancient Sites & Historical Treasures | Dalyan Turkey
tarih.description: Explore Dalyan's rich history spanning 3,000 years — from the ancient Carian city of Kaunos to magnificent Lycian rock tombs carved into riverside cliffs.

tarihKaunos.title: Kaunos Ancient City | 3000-Year-Old Carian-Lycian City
tarihKaunos.description: Visit Kaunos Ancient City near Dalyan — a 3,000-year-old Carian-Lycian settlement with temples, theatre, Roman baths and a strategic harbour on the river delta.

tarihKayaMezarlari.title: Dalyan Rock Tombs | 2400-Year-Old Lycian Royal Tombs
tarihKayaMezarlari.description: Marvel at the iconic Lycian rock tombs of Dalyan — 2,400-year-old royal burial chambers carved high into the cliffs overlooking the Dalyan River and reed-lined delta.

dogaHub.title: Nature & Wildlife | Dalyan Turkey
dogaHub.description: Discover Dalyan's extraordinary nature — Iztuzu turtle beach, Dalyan Delta wetlands, Lake Koycegiz, 180+ bird species and the world's only native Liquidambar forest.

dogaIztuzu.title: Iztuzu Beach - Turtle Beach | 12km Pristine Sand
dogaIztuzu.description: Visit Iztuzu Beach (Turtle Beach) in Dalyan — a 12km pristine sand strip where Caretta Caretta sea turtles nest, bordered by the river delta and Mediterranean Sea.

dogaCaretta.title: Caretta Caretta Sea Turtles | Nesting Season & Conservation
dogaCaretta.description: Learn about Caretta Caretta loggerhead sea turtles in Dalyan — nesting season on Iztuzu Beach, conservation efforts, ethical watching tips and lifecycle facts.

dogaKoycegiz.title: Lake Koycegiz | Freshwater-Saltwater Lagoon
dogaKoycegiz.description: Explore Lake Koycegiz near Dalyan — a vast freshwater-saltwater lagoon surrounded by pine forests, home to thermal springs, wildlife and stunning sunset panoramas.

dogaDelta.title: Dalyan Delta | Reed Maze & Wetland Ecosystem
dogaDelta.description: Navigate the Dalyan Delta reed maze — a protected wetland ecosystem connecting Lake Koycegiz to the Mediterranean, teeming with birdlife, fish and blue crabs.

dogaMaviYengec.title: Blue Crab of Dalyan | Atlantic Visitor in Koycegiz
dogaMaviYengec.description: Discover the blue crab of Dalyan — an Atlantic species thriving in the Koycegiz-Dalyan lagoon system, now a local delicacy and subject of ecological research.

dogaKusGozlem.title: Birdwatching in Dalyan | 180+ Species Guide
dogaKusGozlem.description: Birdwatching in Dalyan and Koycegiz — spot 180+ species including Dalmatian pelicans, kingfishers and ospreys in the delta wetlands and surrounding habitats.

dogaYuvarlakcay.title: Yuvarlakcay | Crystal Stream & Trout Restaurants
dogaYuvarlakcay.description: Visit Yuvarlakcay near Dalyan — a crystal-clear mountain stream with waterside trout restaurants, shaded picnic areas and refreshing natural swimming spots.

dogaSigla.title: Liquidambar Forest | World's Only Native Habitat
dogaSigla.description: Explore the ancient Liquidambar orientalis forest near Dalyan — the world's only remaining native habitat for this rare sweet gum tree, a living botanical relic.

dogaGunBatimi.title: Best Sunset Spots in Dalyan | Photography Guide
dogaGunBatimi.description: Find the best sunset spots in Dalyan — from riverside cafes facing the rock tombs to Iztuzu Beach hilltop and Lake Koycegiz panoramas. Photography tips included.

wellnessHub.title: Wellness & Thermal Springs | Dalyan Turkey
wellnessHub.description: Experience Dalyan's wellness traditions — Sultaniye thermal hot springs with 2,000-year history and legendary mud baths known since Cleopatra's era for healing.

wellnessSultaniye.title: Sultaniye Hot Springs | 2000-Year-Old Healing Waters
wellnessSultaniye.description: Bathe in Sultaniye Hot Springs near Dalyan — 39C thermal waters rich in minerals, used for healing since ancient times. Open-air pools beside Lake Koycegiz shores.

wellnessCamur.title: Dalyan Mud Baths | Cleopatra's Beauty Secret
wellnessCamur.description: Try Dalyan's famous mud baths — mineral-rich natural clay believed to rejuvenate skin since Cleopatra's time. A unique open-air wellness experience by the lake.

turlarHub.title: River Routes & Excursions | Dalyan Turkey
turlarHub.description: Explore Dalyan by boat, jeep or on foot — river cruises past rock tombs, Iztuzu Beach trips, turtle watching, canyon adventures and guided cultural excursions.

turlarTekne.title: Classic Dalyan Boat Tour | Full Day River Experience
turlarTekne.description: Join the classic Dalyan boat tour — a full-day river cruise past Lycian rock tombs, through the reed delta to Iztuzu Beach, mud baths and Sultaniye hot springs.

turlarKaunos.title: Kaunos Culture Tour | Guided Ancient City Walk
turlarKaunos.description: Take a guided Kaunos culture tour from Dalyan — expert-led walk through the ancient city's theatre, temples, agora and harbour with historical commentary.

turlarSuTaksi.title: Iztuzu Water Taxi | Direct Beach Transfer
turlarSuTaksi.description: Catch the Iztuzu water taxi from Dalyan town centre — a quick, scenic river transfer directly to Turtle Beach. Regular departures, affordable and convenient.

turlarCaretta.title: Ethical Caretta Watching Tour | Sea Turtle Observation
turlarCaretta.description: Join an ethical Caretta Caretta watching tour in Dalyan — observe loggerhead sea turtles in their natural habitat with trained guides following conservation rules.

turlarWellness.title: Dalyan Wellness Tour | Mud Bath & Hot Springs Day
turlarWellness.description: Book a Dalyan wellness day tour — combine mud baths, Sultaniye hot springs and a relaxing river boat cruise for the ultimate rejuvenation experience in nature.

turlarJeep.title: Dalyan Jeep Safari | Villages, Waterfalls & Adventure
turlarJeep.description: Explore Dalyan's rugged backcountry by jeep — visit mountain villages, hidden waterfalls, pine forests and panoramic viewpoints on this off-road adventure tour.

turlarEkincik.title: Ekincik Bay & Blue Cave | Hidden Mediterranean Cove
turlarEkincik.description: Sail from Dalyan to Ekincik Bay and the Blue Cave — a hidden Mediterranean cove with turquoise waters, pine-clad shores and excellent snorkelling conditions.

turlarSaklikent.title: Saklikent Canyon & Tlos | Day Trip from Dalyan
turlarSaklikent.description: Day trip from Dalyan to Saklikent Canyon and Tlos ancient city — wade through Europe's deepest gorge and explore a Lycian hilltop fortress with valley views.

turlarGunubirlik.title: Day Trips from Dalyan | Fethiye, Pamukkale & More
turlarGunubirlik.description: Plan day trips from Dalyan — visit Fethiye's Blue Lagoon, Pamukkale travertines, Ephesus ruins, Rhodes Island and more. Transport options and itinerary tips.

yemeIcmeHub.title: Dalyan Cuisine & Local Flavors | Food Guide
yemeIcmeHub.description: Taste Dalyan's local cuisine — fresh river fish, blue crab, Aegean herbs, Ottoman-inspired dishes and farm-to-table flavours at riverside restaurants and markets.

yemeIcmeMutfak.title: Dalyan Kitchen | Traditional Dishes & Seafood
yemeIcmeMutfak.description: Explore Dalyan's traditional kitchen — grilled sea bass, blue crab pasta, herb-stuffed flatbreads, local honey and regional specialities from the Mugla province.

pratikHub.title: Practical Travel Information | Dalyan Turkey
pratikHub.description: Plan your Dalyan trip — airport transfers, best travel seasons, local markets, sustainable tourism tips and answers to frequently asked questions about Dalyan.

pratikHavalimani.title: Dalaman Airport to Dalyan | Transfer & Transport Guide
pratikHavalimani.description: Get from Dalaman Airport to Dalyan easily — shuttle buses, private transfers, car rental and taxi options with journey times, prices and booking advice.

pratikNeZaman.title: Best Time to Visit Dalyan | Season-by-Season Guide
pratikNeZaman.description: Find the best time to visit Dalyan — season-by-season weather, turtle nesting dates, swimming conditions, crowd levels and event calendars for planning your trip.

pratikPazar.title: Koycegiz Monday Market | Authentic Turkish Bazaar
pratikPazar.description: Visit the Koycegiz Monday market near Dalyan — a vibrant Turkish bazaar with fresh produce, spices, textiles, handcrafts and local specialities every Monday.

pratikSSS.title: Dalyan FAQ | Everything You Need to Know
pratikSSS.description: Dalyan FAQ — answers to common questions about getting there, accommodation, beaches, boat tours, weather, safety, currency and local customs for travellers.

pratikSurdurulebilir.title: Sustainable Tourism in Dalyan | Ethical Traveler Guide
pratikSurdurulebilir.description: Practice sustainable tourism in Dalyan — respect turtle nesting sites, support local businesses, reduce plastic waste and protect this fragile Mediterranean ecosystem.

harita.title: Interactive Tourism Map | Dalyan Turkey
harita.description: Explore Dalyan with our interactive map — locate beaches, ancient sites, restaurants, boat stops, thermal springs and key attractions with directions and details.

hakkinda.title: Where is Dalyan? | Geography & Getting Here
hakkinda.description: Learn about Dalyan's geography — located in Mugla province on Turkey's Turquoise Coast, nestled between Lake Koycegiz and the Mediterranean Sea. Getting here guide.

footer.description: Your complete guide to Dalyan, Turkey — one of the Mediterranean's most enchanting destinations.
